return.message: Document Presentations can only be lodged for Issued instruments (Current State: ${lc?.businessStateId ?: 'UNKNOWN'})

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, transactionTypeEnumId: 'IMP_PRESENTATION', transactionStatusId: 'TX_DRAFT', transactionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, makerUserId: ec.user.userId, makerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, priorityEnumId: priorityEnumId ?: 'NORMAL', versionNumber: 1, relatedRecordId: presentationId, relatedRecordType: 'PRESENTATION' ]

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, transactionTypeEnumId: 'IMP_SG_ISSUANCE', transactionStatusId: 'TX_DRAFT', transactionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, makerUserId: ec.user.userId, makerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, priorityEnumId: priorityEnumId ?: 'NORMAL', versionNumber: 1, relatedRecordId: guaranteeId, relatedRecordType: 'SHIPPING_GUARANTEE' ]

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, transactionTypeEnumId: 'IMP_CANCELLATION', transactionStatusId: 'TX_DRAFT', transactionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, makerUserId: ec.user.userId, makerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, comments: cancellationReason, versionNumber: 1 ]

actions.script: def configs = [ "SBLC_COMM_ACTIVE": false, "TENOR_RESTRICTION": "Sight Only", "MAX_TOLERANCE": 0.10, "ALLOW_REVOLVING": true, "ALLOW_ADV_PAYMENT": true, "IS_STANDBY": true, "IS_TRANSFERABLE": true, "ACCOUNTING_FRAMEWORK": "Islamic", "MANDATORY_MARGIN": 1.00, "DOC_EXAM_SLA_DAYS": 2, "DEFAULT_SWIFT_FORMAT": "MT760" ] value = configs[key]

ec.artifactExecution.disableAuthz(); context.offset = (pageIndex ?: 0) * (pageSize ?: 20) context.instrumentSearchLike = instrumentSearch ? "%${instrumentSearch}%" : null context.transactionSearchLike = transactionSearch ? "%${transactionSearch}%" : null

ec.logger.info("DEBUG: get#TradeTransactions - instSearch: ${instrumentSearch}, txnSearch: ${transactionSearch}, found ${transactionList?.size()} records. Total: ${transactionCount}. offset: ${offset}, limit: ${pageSize}") context.transactionList = transactionList ?: [] context.transactionCount = transactionCount?.intValue() ?: 0 context.pageIndex = pageIndex ?: 0 context.pageSize = pageSize ?: 20 ec.artifactExecution.enableAuthz();

log.message: Party ${partyId} not found in trade.TradeParty during assign#InstrumentParty

return.message: Bank ${party.partyName} ${bank?.swiftBic ? '(' + bank.swiftBic + ')' : ''} has no active RMA for role ${roleLabel}.
Bank ${party.partyName} has no Nostro account configured
Insufficient FI Limit for ${party.partyName}: Required ${inst?.amount}, Available ${availLimit}

actions.script: ec.artifactExecution.disableAuthz() def facilities = [ [facilityId: "FAC-ACME-001", ownerPartyId: "ACME_CORP_001", totalApprovedLimit: 10000000.00, utilizedAmount: 2500000.00, facilityExpiryDate: java.sql.Date.valueOf("2027-12-31"), description: "Core Working Capital Line"], [facilityId: "FAC-GLOBAL-002", ownerPartyId: "GLOBAL_EXP_002", totalApprovedLimit: 5000000.00, utilizedAmount: 4800000.00, facilityExpiryDate: java.sql.Date.valueOf("2027-01-01"), description: "Trade Export Line"], [facilityId: "FAC-EXPIRED-003", ownerPartyId: "ACME_CORP_001", totalApprovedLimit: 1000000.00, utilizedAmount: 0.00, facilityExpiryDate: java.sql.Date.valueOf("2024-12-31"), description: "Old Line"], [facilityId: "FAC-ZIZI-001", ownerPartyId: "ORG_ZIZI_CORP", totalApprovedLimit: 1000000.00, utilizedAmount: 0.00, facilityExpiryDate: java.sql.Date.valueOf("2027-12-31"), description: "Working Capital Line"] ] facilities.each { f -> ec.entity.makeValue("trade.CustomerFacility").setAll(f).createOrUpdate() ec.logger.info("Restored Facility: ${f.facilityId}") }

return.message: No party assigned for role ${roleEnumId} on instrument ${instrumentId}
